criteria.criterion: DBB-001: scan() returns {path, line, content} with line as positive integer on all backends
DBB-002: AgenticStoreBackend scan() result includes line field
DBB-003: AgenticStoreBackend list() paths have leading slash
DBB-004: OPFSBackend list() paths have leading slash
DBB-005: NodeFsBackend list() paths have leading slash
DBB-006: NotFoundError thrown on missing file read
DBB-007: PermissionDeniedError thrown on readOnly write
DBB-008: IOError thrown on backend I/O failure
DBB-009: OPFS walkDir errors logged and not silently swallowed
DBB-010: Per-backend test suite covers core operations
DBB-011: Cross-backend consistency test suite passes
DBB-012: Empty path rejected with error
DBB-013: Path with special characters can be written and read back
DBB-014: README includes backend configuration examples for all 3 backends
DBB-015: README includes performance comparison table with at least 3 rows
